/usr/bin/c++    -rdynamic -pthread CMakeFiles/cleanup.dir/cleanup.cpp.o  -o /home/pi/ros_catkin_ws/devel_isolated/rosconsole_bridge/lib/rosconsole_bridge/cleanup   -L/opt/ros/melodic/lib  -Wl,-rpath,/home/pi/ros_catkin_ws/devel_isolated/rosconsole_bridge/lib:/opt/ros/melodic/lib /home/pi/ros_catkin_ws/devel_isolated/rosconsole_bridge/lib/librosconsole_bridge.so /opt/ros/melodic/lib/librosconsole.so /opt/ros/melodic/lib/librosconsole_log4cxx.so /opt/ros/melodic/lib/librosconsole_backend_interface.so -llog4cxx -lboost_regex /opt/ros/melodic/lib/librostime.so /opt/ros/melodic/lib/libcpp_common.so -lboost_system -lboost_thread -lboost_chrono -lboost_date_time -lboost_atomic /usr/lib/aarch64-linux-gnu/libconsole_bridge.so.0.4 /usr/lib/aarch64-linux-gnu/libconsole_bridge.so.0.4
